Source: Claude Docs - Build with Claude
URL: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/overview (redirects to platform.claude.com)
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Claude Features Overview

Claude's API surface organized into five areas:

## 1. Model Capabilities
- Context windows: Up to 1M tokens
- Adaptive thinking: Dynamic reasoning depth (recommended for Opus 4.6)
- Batch processing: 50% cost savings for async bulk requests
- Citations: Source document grounding with exact references
- Data residency: Geographic inference controls (global/us)
- Effort parameter: Token usage control (Opus 4.6, Opus 4.5)
- Extended thinking: Step-by-step reasoning transparency
- PDF support: Text and visual content analysis
- Search results: Natural citations for RAG applications
- Structured outputs: JSON Schema enforcement

## 2. Tools (Server-side)
- Code execution: Sandboxed environment (free with web search/fetch)
- Web fetch: Full page content retrieval
- Web search: Real-world data augmentation

## 3. Tools (Client-side)
- Bash: System shell commands
- Computer use: Screen interaction (screenshots, mouse, keyboard)
- Memory: Cross-conversation information persistence
- Text editor: File creation and editing

## 4. Tool Infrastructure
- Agent Skills: Pre-built (PowerPoint, Excel, Word, PDF) and custom
- Fine-grained tool streaming
- MCP connector: Remote MCP server integration
- Programmatic tool calling: Tools from within code execution containers
- Tool search: Scale to thousands of tools with regex-based discovery

## 5. Context Management
- Compaction: Server-side context summarization (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6)
- Context editing: Automatic context management with configurable strategies
- Automatic prompt caching: Single parameter, automatic cache point management
- Prompt caching: 5-minute and 1-hour durations
- Token counting

## 6. Files and Assets
- Files API: Upload/manage PDFs, images, text files (beta)

Platform availability across Claude API, Bedrock, Vertex AI, Azure AI
